title: AI-SDLC Common Definitions
description: Shared type definitions for AI-SDLC Framework resources.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the resource.

name.description: A unique identifier within the namespace. DNS-label format.

namespace.description: The scoping unit, typically a team or project identifier.

labels.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for selection and filtering.

annotations.description: Non-identifying key-value pairs for tooling and operational metadata.

condition.description: A structured status entry representing an aspect of a resource's observed state.

type.description: The aspect of state this condition represents.

reason.description: A machine-readable reason code for the current status.

message.description: A human-readable description of the current status.

lastTransitionTime.description: When the condition last transitioned from one status to another.

lastEvaluated.description: When the condition was last evaluated.

secretRef.description: A reference to a secret value resolved at runtime.
The name or key of the secret to reference.

duration.description: A duration value. Shorthand (e.g., 60s, 5m, 2h, 1d, 2w) or ISO 8601.

metricCondition.description: A metric threshold condition for evaluation.
